meaning: n.涓板瘜,娴撶儓,瀵岃,瀵岄ザ,鍗庣編
examples: It all adds to the richness of human life.
The richness of Oshima's work lies in its ability to fuse alienation with involvement.
Few writers approach his richness of language.
In the Pacific Northwest, Pinot Gris is renowned as the dream match for the oily richness of salmon.
This enables the richness of the Internet to compensate for weaknesses in the silicon product.
